bullets.text: Improved application performance by \textbf{40\% reduced load times} across \textbf{2,500+ users} by owning end-to-end \textbf{React.js} frontend upgrade project.
Increased team-based platform \textbf{usage by 25\%} by leading cross-functional development of multi-company access feature using React.js and Node.js for shared accounting workflows.

Enhanced \textbf{data accuracy by 35\%} and reduced manual entry time by collaborating with engineers to implement AI receipt processing using OpenAI computer vision for automatic transaction matching.
Achieved \textbf{1,500+ active users} with \textbf{98\% uptime} by taking end-to-end ownership of finance platform development using Django and React.js with rigorous operations.

Demonstrated algorithmic trading capabilities to major financial institutions by designing and delivering functional prototypes for Bank of Montreal, National Bank, and Investment Planning Council Canada.

Enabled reliable live updates for \textbf{500+ concurrent users} with \textbf{sub-100ms latency} by building and operating real-time portfolio tracking system using WebSocket connections and Redis caching.
Enabled strategy simulation across \textbf{5+ years} of historical data with \textbf{sub-500ms} response times by owning development of backtesting engine using React.js and Node.js.

Contributed to \textbf{9\%} increase in platform retention rates by collaborating through code reviews to safely deploy trading strategy validation features helping users identify profitable algorithms.

Built high-converting homepage component using React.js and WordPress for \textbf{One of One Funding}, increasing user interaction by \textbf{17\%} for company generating \textbf{\$1M+ monthly revenue}.
Delivered custom web applications to \textbf{25+ small businesses} using Next.js and modern JavaScript frameworks.
Improved data pipeline processing Lansweeper asset management API for \textbf{1,200+ devices}, implementing automated synchronization and ETL processes saving \textbf{20+ hours} per deployment cycle.
Developed Python scripts for system imaging automation and software deployment across \textbf{50+ workstations}, reducing manual configuration time from days to hours.
